meta.title: Irwin Stelzer on the European Economy for The Kudlow Report
meta.description: Hudson Senior Fellow and Director of the Center for Economic Policy Studies Irwin Stelzer joined The Kudlow Report on September 30 to discuss the future of the European economy.
